'''shashocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebid|cebid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebid|cebid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shashocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæshecheth|shæshecheth]] || [[word:shæshechej|shæshechej]] || [[word:shæshechesh|shæshechesh]] || [[word:shæsheche|shæsheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shashoshochoth|shashoshochoth]] || [[word:shashoshochoj|shashoshochoj]] || [[word:shashoshochosh|shashoshochosh]] || [[word:shashoshocho|shashoshocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shashochoth|shashochoth]] || [[word:shashochoj|shashochoj]] || [[word:shashochosh|shashochosh]] || [[word:shashocho|shashocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shashofchoth|shashofchoth]] || [[word:shashofchoj|shashofchoj]] || [[word:shashofchosh|shashofchosh]] || [[word:shashofchof|shashofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shashochotho|shashochotho]] || [[word:shashochojo|shashochojo]] || [[word:shashochosho|shashochosho]] || [[word:shashochoko|shashochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shashochoth|shashochoth]] || [[word:shashochoj|shashochoj]] || [[word:shashochosh|shashochosh]] || [[word:shashocho|shashocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shashochothol|shashochothol]] || [[word:shashochojol|shashochojol]] || [[word:shashochoshol|shashochoshol]] || [[word:shashochokol|shashochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shashochothotho|shashochothotho]] || [[word:shashochojojo|shashochojojo]] || [[word:shashochoshosho|shashochoshosho]] || [[word:shashochoko|shashochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shashochothon|shashochothon]] || [[word:shashochojon|shashochojon]] || [[word:shashochoshon|shashochoshon]] || [[word:shashochokon|shashochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shashochothoro|shashochothoro]] || [[word:shashochojoro|shashochojoro]] || [[word:shashochoshoro|shashochoshoro]] || [[word:shashochokoro|shashochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
